title: lycopodium complanatum var. chamaecyparissus
intro: Lycopodium complanatum var. chamaecyparissus, also known as Staghorn Club Moss, is a rare and little-known variant of the Lycopodium complanatum species. This plant is a type of club moss, a small, evergreen plant that grows in dense, velvety masses, and is native to certain regions of Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Lycopodium complanatum var. chamaecyparissus include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of this plant include relief from coughs and congestion, and it can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and ointments.
